name: martix-markdown

publisher.name: MartiXDev
publisher.distributionModel: standalone skill with direct Copilot marketplace registration

summary: Standalone-first MartiX skill package for markdownlint-aware Markdown authoring, MD-code triage, grouped rule routing, repo-local overlay comparison, custom-rule decisions, Prettier coexistence, and accessibility-aware review.
abstract: This package is the canonical source for the MartiX Markdown skill. It now ships the authored entrypoints, 7 grouped rule files, 8 reference docs including the instruction-bridge layer, 4 templates, taxonomy assets, and registration-ready metadata that standalone installs and direct marketplace registration should consume from src/skills.

status.scaffoldNote: The package is fully authored for its initial preview scope: 7 grouped markdownlint rule files, 8 reference files, maintainer docs, templates, taxonomy assets, skill-creator eval scaffolding, and marketplace registration metadata are in place.

precedenceModel: Preserve document meaning, structure, link targets, and accessibility
Establish the upstream markdownlint default from approved upstream sources
Apply repository-local overlays separately when this repository adds tighter expectations
Treat package-local files as derived surfaces that do not override upstream markdownlint semantics

rulePrefixes.foundation-configuration: Install flow, config surfaces, CLI and API usage, rule aliases and tags, validation workflow, and narrow config overrides
rulePrefixes.headings-front-matter-structure: Heading order, first-heading expectations, section spacing, front-matter-adjacent structure notes, and document-shape review
rulePrefixes.lists-whitespace-block-spacing: Bullet and ordered lists, indentation, blank lines, trailing spaces, tabs, blockquote-adjacent spacing, and file hygiene
rulePrefixes.code-html-emphasis: Fenced code blocks, language hints, inline HTML boundaries, emphasis markers, and nearby readability concerns
rulePrefixes.links-images-accessibility: Link syntax, fragments, reference links, image handling, descriptive link text, alt text, and accessibility review edges
rulePrefixes.tables-layout-edges: Table formatting, row consistency, blank-line boundaries, compact versus expanded layout choices, and nearby layout edge cases
rulePrefixes.custom-rules-suppressions-toolchain: Custom rule authoring, helper packages, inline disables, config-based suppressions, formatter coexistence, and other toolchain boundary choices

domains.displayName: Headings, front matter, and document structure
Custom rules, suppressions, and toolchain coexistence

notes: Use the standalone package as the source of truth for local installs and direct folder-based validation.
Official docs currently show npx skills add, not npx skill add.
Prefer a direct folder path or direct GitHub tree URL because src/skills is not a documented repo-root discovery location.

secondarySurface.strategy: register the canonical standalone package directly from src/skills

discovery.sameNameConflictRisk: A standalone project or personal install can shadow a plugin-delivered copy with the same skill name.
discovery.recommendedValidationApproach: Use a clean environment or remove any standalone install before validating the marketplace-delivered copy.

local.role: long-form companion describing the grouped rule library, review routes, source boundaries, and instruction-bridge layer
stable section contract for grouped markdownlint rule files
internal scaffold for authoring grouped markdownlint rule files
approved source index, precedence model, grouped domain seed, and authoring guardrails
grouped rule map covering all built-in markdownlint rule families in this package
decision map for config, suppressions, validation surfaces, and custom-rule escalation
bridge layer that compares upstream markdownlint defaults with repo-local Markdown and accessibility overlays
fast routing guide for lint-backed versus human-review accessibility checks
compact fallback summary of common markdownlint rule families
install, preview, validation, and package-layout guidance
package-local coexistence note for Prettier and other Markdown tooling
starter repo config sample for narrow markdownlint overrides
research memo scaffold for future markdownlint workstreams and bridge updates
comparison scaffold for upstream-versus-overlay or toolchain analysis
machine-readable grouped domain taxonomy, domain status, and tag hints
stable section, rule, reference, and domain ordering data

external.title: GitHub Copilot CLI create skills documentation
